category_sources: source_facts.description says it is the CLI client for Incus; official docs describe Incus as a system container and virtual machine manager.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is incus; official Linux Containers Incus pages use the Incus display name.
docs_sources: Official Incus documentation is hosted under linuxcontainers.org/incus/docs/main/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Incus installation/docs pages reference cloning https://github.com/lxc/incus and the Incus source code on GitHub.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Incus CLI; official docs describe containers, virtual machines, Linux distributions, and private-cloud style infrastructure management.
